about.title: Who I am — and why I create
about.description:
I’m an independent creator exploring the intersection of technology, design, and emotion. My work is about building products that think — and feel.
Catharsis is the core of it — the moment when creation transforms emotion into clarity. Through art, code, and curiosity, I seek to build worlds worth living in — together.
Every project I make is a piece of that journey — a reflection of meaning, balance, and the pursuit of something real.

indie.title: Independent creation, end to end
indie.subline: One seamless system — from idea to deployment
indie.outro: All of this — one continuum. That’s what “independent creation” means to me.

notFound.title: The page dissolved into glass
notFound.description: You have left the known paths of kotarsis. But some fragments can still be gathered.
quotes: Some pages disappear before we have a chance to open them.
Glass remembers the path better than people do.
Not every loss means the end of the journey.
Sometimes an error is simply another entrance.
You have found the void between worlds.
Not every route was meant to be walked.
Even a lost page leaves a reflection behind.
